name: orbital-signal
description: libsignal bindings for Orbital-Mobile via uniffi-bindgen-react-native
author: Pure Karma Labs

scripts.build:ios: rm -f rust-profile-ios.txt && ubrn build ios --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && echo debug > rust-profile-ios.txt
scripts.build:ios:release: rm -f rust-profile-ios.txt && ubrn build ios --config ubrn.config.yaml --release --and-generate && echo release > rust-profile-ios.txt
scripts.build:android: rm -f android/src/main/jniLibs/rust-profile.txt && ubrn build android --config ubrn.config.yaml --and-generate && echo debug > android/src/main/jniLibs/rust-profile.txt
scripts.build:android:release: rm -f android/src/main/jniLibs/rust-profile.txt && ubrn build android --config ubrn.config.yaml --release --and-generate && echo release > android/src/main/jniLibs/rust-profile.txt
